prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota-sourced 1UZ-FE V8 (4.0L, 32-valve, quad-cam) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Tomei and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a 4-2-1 header setup by HKS, paired with a GReddy SP Elite standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping to achieve 400+ hp at 6,800 RPM

Installation of a custom forced-induction system utilizing a Garrett GT35R turbocharger with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing, a custom air-to-water intercooler by GReddy, and a Tomei M82 blow-off valve, all supported by a custom fuel system upgrade including dual Walbro 450 LPH fuel pumps and ID1000 injectors

Full suspension overhaul with custom Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound damping), polyurethane bushings by SuperPro for the front and rear subframes, and a custom front strut tower brace by Cusco to reduce chassis flex, paired with a set of custom 18x9.5 and 18x11 forged wheels by Work Emotion CR Kiwami wrapped in 245/40R18 and 285/35R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works kit specifically modified for the Orochi’s unique chassis, including extended carbon fiber fenders, custom front and rear bumpers, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated dual exhaust outlets

Custom carbon fiber hood with a functional central vent and integrated NACA ducts for improved engine bay cooling, paired with a custom carbon fiber trunk lid featuring a ducktail spoiler for enhanced rear downforce, both fabricated by Seibon Carbon

Full custom interior reupholstery using Alcantara and Nappa leather by Status Racing, featuring a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel, a full digital gauge cluster by Defi, and custom Recaro SP-G bucket seats with six-point harnesses by Takata
